description_long: This is a sleek, modern gaming laptop with a matte black finish and angular design elements. The lid features a prominent diamond-shaped logo at its center, while the interior showcases a full-sized keyboard with RGB backlighting and a large touchpad below. The keyboard includes a function row and highlighted WASD keys, indicating a gaming focus. The laptop's screen is open, revealing a thin bezel and a built-in webcam at the top. On the palm rest, there are two stickers: one indicating an NVIDIA RTX graphics card and another with a blue and white design. The sides of the laptop are equipped with various ports, and the overall build appears robust and premium.
description: A matte black gaming laptop with RGB backlit keyboard, diamond logo on the lid, and visible stickers on the palm rest. The design is angular and modern, with a large touchpad and multiple side ports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen, full RGB keyboard, large touchpad, and two stickers on the right palm rest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the laptop's slim profile, visible keyboard edge, and partially visible ports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the diamond-shaped logo centered on the lid and the angular vent design at the hinge.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the keyboard edge, touchpad, and a clearer look at the palm rest stickers.
attribute_brand_logo: A diamond-shaped logo with a stylized design is centered on the back of the lid, featuring a white outline and geometric pattern.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and appears to be off, with no visible content displayed.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard layout is QWERTY with a function row, highlighted WASD keys, and no numeric keypad. The keys are backlit with RGB lighting.
attribute_sticker_placement: Two stickers are present on the right palm rest: one rectangular sticker with NVIDIA RTX branding and another blue and white sticker above it.
